query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_wallets (
  user_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
  balance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_deposited DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_withdrawn DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_commissions_paid DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  CONSTRAINT balance_non_negative CHECK (balance >= 0)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2QhtR3vkBoFkFzg.bea0b6e60b41 --database 8pdnKAMC4AMrGe9CxvLDut --execute 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_wallets (
  user_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
  balance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_deposited DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_withdrawn DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_commissions_paid DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  CONSTRAINT balance_non_negative CHECK (balance >= 0)
);
